design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass OK; hero max-width 1120px -> 2–3 line flow; centered hero & actions verified; bento + compare grids include grid-auto-flow:dense; contrast check: ink/white pills; competitors label sweep complete; cache phrase included; sources mapped to recruiter + workflow automation trend.
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page showing how recruiters use Super’s personal AI agents to source candidates, operate ATS and scheduling tools, and reuse a computer‑use cache so repetitive interview coordination gets faster and cheaper over time.
